self_report.numeric_verdict: For a=1,2,3 SymPy gives sqrt(pi)*(cosh(2)-sinh(2))=sqrt(pi)*e^{-2}, sqrt(pi/2)*(cosh(4)-sinh(4))=sqrt(pi/2)*e^{-4}, sqrt(pi/3)*(cosh(6)-sinh(6))=sqrt(pi/3)*e^{-6}, matching sqrt(pi/a)*e^{-2a} rather than the claimed sqrt(pi/a)*e^{-a}.
self_report.notes: Standard 1985 B-5 result is sqrt(pi/a)*e^{-2a} (substitution u=sqrt(a)(sqrt(t)-1/sqrt(t)) gives u^2+2a in exponent); the claim drops the factor of 2.
